name: crossbridge
description: Local-first, VPN-compatible Windows and Android bridge app.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @crossbridge/protocol && npm run build -w @crossbridge/crypto && npm run build -w @crossbridge/shared-types && npm run build -w @crossbridge/relay && npm run build -w @crossbridge/windows
scripts.test: npm run test -w @crossbridge/protocol && npm run test -w @crossbridge/crypto && npm run test -w @crossbridge/relay && npm run test -w @crossbridge/windows
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.verify:full: npm run check && npm run android:doctor && npm run android:test && npm run android:build && npm run verify:e2e
